title: Component Field
text: Component Field A Component Field is a Development Object that represents a unit of data in a Component Entity. A Component Field that is created using a Modeled Field is a derived field and inherits from the Modeled Field. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: fld Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Entity Contains: Value, Property , Code Container Generalization: Field Specializations: — Derived Component Field , Non-Derived Field Compilation output: — Generates: — URI format: cpt: ComponentName /ent: EntityName /fld: FieldName Specialization Component Field specializes Development Object and Field in the following ways: It has a Component Entity as parent. It defines a data field, control, or constant data. It has a widget type and widget properties. Properties Object Properties: Name Type Location Description Documentation Configuration Properties: Inherits Inherits From Is Generic (only in modeled components) Is Bound (only in derived components) Bound To (only in derived components) Data I/O Properties: Data Type Is External Is Static Is Control Database Interface (Entities) Field Syntax Field Layout Initial Value Presentation properties: Pop-up Menu FRM Widget Type (Field) Area Frames presentation properties: Widget Type Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Horizontal Repetition Vertical Repetition Border Index Color Print Frames presentation properties: Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Border Index Color Object frame properties are defined in the Define Frames worksheet.
